THE BOOK OF LEGAL PENALTIES

titles.ar: كِتَابُ الْأَيْمَانِ وَ النُّذُورِ وَ الْكَفَّارَاتِ
titles.en: THE BOOK OF OATHS, AND THE VOWS, AND THE EXPIATIONS
The Book - Garden (of Flowers)
Chapter 1

titles.ar: بَابُ فَرْضِ الْعِلْمِ وَ وُجُوبِ طَلَبِهِ وَ الْحَثِّ عَلَيْهِ
titles.en: Chapter 1 – The necessity of the knowledge, and the Obligation to seek it, and the urging upon it

titles.ar: بَابُ صِفَةِ الْعِلْمِ وَ فَضْلِهِ وَ فَضْلِ الْعُلَمَاءِ
titles.en: Chapter 2 – Description of the knowledge and its merits, and merits of the scholars
Chapter 3 – Types of the people
Chapter 4 – The Rewards of the scholar and the student
Chapter 5 – Description of the scholars
Chapter 6 – Rights of the scholar
Chapter 7 – Loss of the scholar
Chapter 8 – Gatherings of the scholars and their company
Chapter 9 – Asking the scholar and discussing with him
Chapter 10 – Granting the knowledge

titles.ar: بَابُ النَّهْيِ عَنِ الْقَوْلِ بِغَيْرِ عِلْمٍ
titles.en: Chapter 11 – The forbiddance from the speech without knowledge
Chapter 12 – The one who acts without knowledge
Chapter 13 – Utilisation of the knowledge

titles.ar: بَابُ الْمُسْتَأْكِلِ بِعِلْمِهِ وَ الْمُبَاهِي بِهِ
titles.en: Chapter 14 – The consumer with his knowledge and the boaster with it

titles.ar: بَابُ لُزُومِ الْحُجَّةِ عَلَى الْعَالِمِ وَ تَشْدِيدِ الْأَمْرِ عَلَيْهِ
titles.en: Chapter 15 – The necessity of the Proofasws upon the world and the emphasis of the matter upon it
Chapter 16 – The Miscellaneous

titles.ar: بَابُ رِوَايَةِ الْكُتُبِ وَ الْحَدِيثِ وَ فَضْلِ الْكِتَابَةِ وَ التَّمَسُّكِ بِالْكُتُبِ
titles.en: Chapter 17 – Reporting the books, and the Hadeeth, and the merits of the writing, and the attachment with the writings
Chapter 18 – The Taqleed (Emulation)

titles.ar: بَابُ الْبِدَعِ وَ الرَّأْيِ وَ الْمَقَايِيسِ
titles.en: Chapter 19 – The innovation, and the opinion, and the analogies

titles.ar: بَابُ الرَّدِّ إِلَى الْكِتَابِ وَ السُّنَّةِ وَ أَنَّهُ لَيْسَ شَيْ‏ءٌ مِنَ الْحَلَالِ وَ الْحَرَامِ وَ جَمِيعِ مَا يَحْتَاجُ النَّاسُ إِلَيْهِ إِلَّا وَ قَدْ جَاءَ فِيهِ كِتَابٌ أَوْ سُنَّةٌ
titles.en: Chapter 20 – The referring to the Book and the Sunnah, and that there is nothing from the Permissible and the Prohibition and the entirety of what the people would be need to except that the Book or Sunnah has come with it
Chapter 21 – Differences in the Hadeeth

titles.ar: بَابُ الْأَخْذِ بِالسُّنَّةِ وَ شَوَاهِدِ الْكِتَابِ
titles.en: Chapter 22 – The taking by the Sunnah and the evidence of the Book (Quran)

titles.ar: بَابُ حُدُوثِ الْعَالَمِ وَ إِثْبَاتِ الْمُحْدِثِ
titles.en: Chapter 1 – The Occurrence of the universe and the proof of the Originator
Chapter 2 – Applicability of the word that Heazwj is a ‘thing’

titles.ar: بَابُ أَنَّهُ لَا يُعْرَفُ إِلَّا بِهِ
titles.en: Chapter 3 – Heazwj cannot be recognised except by Himazwj
Chapter 4 – The lowest of the recognition
Chapter 5 – The Worshipped One (Deity)
Chapter 6 – Coming into being and the space
Chapter 7 – The Lineage

titles.ar: بَابُ النَّهْيِ عَنِ الْكَلَامِ فِي الْكَيْفِيَّةِ
titles.en: Chapter 8 – The Forbiddance about speaking regarding the Qualitative State (how)
Chapter 9 – Regarding the invalidation of sighting

titles.ar: بَابُ النَّهْيِ عَنِ الصِّفَةِ بِغَيْرِ مَا وَصَفَ بِهِ نَفْسَهُ تَعَالَى
titles.en: Chapter 10 – The Forbiddance from describing with other than what Heazwj has Described Himselfazwj with

titles.ar: بَابُ النَّهْيِ عَنِ الْجِسْمِ وَ الصُّورَةِ
titles.en: Chapter 11 – The Forbiddance from (describing Allahazwj) with the body and the image
Chapter 12 – Attributes of the Self

titles.ar: باب آخَرُ وَ هُوَ مِنَ الْبَابِ الْأَوَّلِ
titles.en: Chapter 13 – Another (chapter), and it is from the first chapter

titles.ar: بَابُ الْإِرَادَةِ أَنَّهَا مِنْ صِفَاتِ الْفِعْلِ وَ سَائِرِ صِفَاتِ الْفِعْلِ
titles.en: Chapter 14 – The Intention (Will), it is from the Attributes of the deed, and the rest of the Attributes of the deed
Chapter 15 – Occurrence (coming into being) of the Names
Chapter 16 – The Meaning of the Names and their derivatives

titles.ar: باب آخَرُ وَ هُوَ مِنَ الْبَابِ الْأَوَّلِ إِلَّا أَنَّ فِيهِ زِيَادَةً وَ هُوَ الْفَرْقُ مَا بَيْنَ الْمَعَانِي الَّتِي تَحْتَ أَسْمَاءِ اللَّهِ وَ أَسْمَاءِ الْمَخْلُوقِينَ
titles.en: Chapter 17 – Another Chapter and it is from the first, except that in it is an addition, and it is the difference between the meaning which is beneath the Names of Allahazwj and the names of the creatures
Chapter 18 – Explanation of Al-Samad
Chapter 19 – The Motion and the Transformation (Change of state to a state)
Chapter 20 – The Throne (الْعَرْشِ ) and the Chair (الْكُرْسِيِّ)
Chapter 21 – The Spirit
Chapter 22 – Comprehensive of the Tawheed (Oneness)
Chapter 23 – The Miscellaneous
Chapter 24 – The Changing of Allahazwj’s Decision (الْبَدَاءِ)

titles.ar: باب فِي أَنَّهُ لَا يَكُونُ شَيْ‏ءٌ فِي السَّمَاءِ وَ الْأَرْضِ إِلَّا بِسَبْعَةٍ
titles.en: Chapter 25 – Regarding that there is nothing coming into being in the skies and the earth except with seven (characteristics)
Chapter 26 – The Desire and the Intention
Chapter 27 – The Trial and the Testing
Chapter 28 – The Happiness and the Misery
Chapter 29 – The Good and the Evil

titles.ar: بَابُ الْجَبْرِ وَ الْقَدَرِ وَ الْأَمْرِ بَيْنَ الْأَمْرَيْنِ
titles.en: Chapter 30 – The Compulsion, and the Pre-determination, and the matter is between the two matters
Chapter 31 – The Capability

titles.ar: بَابُ الْبَيَانِ وَ التَّعْرِيفِ وَ لُزُومِ الْحُجَّةِ
titles.en: Chapter 32 – The Declaration, and the Definition, and the necessity of the Proofasws
Chapter 33 – Different Arguments upon Hisazwj servants
Chapter 34 – Proofasws of Allahazwj upon Hisazwj creatures

titles.ar: بَابُ الْهِدَايَةِ أَنَّهَا مِنَ اللَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ
titles.en: Chapter 35 – The Guidance, it is from Allahazwj Mighty and Majestic
Chapter 1 – The desperate need to the Divine Authority

titles.ar: بَابُ طَبَقَاتِ الْأَنْبِيَاءِ وَ الرُّسُلِ وَ الْأَئِمَّةِ ( عليهم السلام )
titles.en: Chapter 2 – The categories of the Prophetsasws, and the Rasoolsas, and the Imamsasws

titles.ar: بَابُ الْفَرْقِ بَيْنَ الرَّسُولِ وَ النَّبِيِّ وَ الْمُحَدَّثِ
titles.en: Chapter 3 – The difference between the Rasoolas, and the Prophetas, and the Muhaddith

titles.ar: بَابُ أَنَّ الْحُجَّةَ لَا تَقُومُ لِلَّهِ عَلَى خَلْقِهِ إِلَّا بِإِمَامٍ
titles.en: Chapter 4 – The Divine Authority cannot be established for Allahazwj upon Hisazwj creatures except by an Imamasws

titles.ar: بَابُ أَنَّ الْأَرْضَ لَا تَخْلُو مِنْ حُجَّةٍ
titles.en: Chapter 5 – The earth cannot be empty from a Divine Authority

titles.ar: بَابُ أَنَّهُ لَوْ لَمْ يَبْقَ فِي الْأَرْضِ إِلَّا رَجُلَانِ لَكَانَ أَحَدُهُمَا الْحُجَّةَ
titles.en: Chapter 6 – If it was that there did not remain in the earth except for two men, one of the two would be the Divine Aurhority

titles.ar: بَابُ مَعْرِفَةِ الْإِمَامِ وَ الرَّدِّ إِلَيْهِ
titles.en: Chapter 7 – Recognition of the Imamasws and the referring (of the matters) to himasws

titles.ar: بَابُ فَرْضِ طَاعَةِ الْأَئِمَّةِ ( عليهم السلام )
titles.en: Chapter 8 – Necessity of obeying the Imamsasws

titles.ar: باب فِي أَنَّ الْأَئِمَّةَ شُهَدَاءُ اللَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ عَلَى خَلْقِهِ
titles.en: Chapter 9 – Regarding that the Imamsasws are the witnesses of Allahazwj Mighty and Majestic upon Hisazwj creatures

titles.ar: بَابُ أَنَّ الْأَئِمَّةَ ( عليهم السلام ) هُمُ الْهُدَاةُ
titles.en: Chapter 10 – The Imamsasws, theyasws are the Guides

titles.ar: بَابُ أَنَّ الْأَئِمَّةَ ( عليهم السلام ) وُلَاةُ أَمْرِ اللَّهِ وَ خَزَنَةُ عِلْمِهِ
titles.en: Chapter 11 – The Imamsasws are the Masters of the Command (Wali Al-Amr) and the Treasurers of Hisazwj Knowledge

titles.ar: بَابُ أَنَّ الْأَئِمَّةَ ( عليهم السلام ) خُلَفَاءُ اللَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ فِي أَرْضِهِ وَ أَبْوَابُهُ الَّتِي مِنْهَا يُؤْتَى
titles.en: Chapter 12 – The Imamsasws are the Caliphs of Allahazwj Mighty and Majestic in Hisazwj earth and Hisazwj Doors from which Heazwj is accessed

titles.ar: بَابُ أَنَّ الْأَئِمَّةَ ( عليهم السلام ) نُورُ اللَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ
titles.en: Chapter 13 The Imamsasws are the Light (نُورُ ) of Allahazwj Mighty and Majestic

titles.ar: بَابُ أَنَّ الْأَئِمَّةَ هُمْ أَرْكَانُ الْأَرْضِ
titles.en: Chapter 14 – The Imamsasws, theyasws are the Stabiliers of the earth

titles.ar: باب نَادِرٌ جَامِعٌ فِي فَضْلِ الْإِمَامِ وَ صِفَاتِهِ
titles.en: Chapter 15 – Miscellaneous - Summarisation of the merits of the Imamasws and hisasws description

titles.ar: بَابُ أَنَّ الْأَئِمَّةَ ( عليهم السلام ) وُلَاةُ الْأَمْرِ وَ هُمُ النَّاسُ الْمَحْسُودُونَ الَّذِينَ ذَكَرَهُمُ اللَّهُ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ
titles.en: Chapter 16 – The Imamsasws are the Masters of the Command (Wali Al-Amr), and theyasws are the envied people whom Allahazwj Mighty and Majestic has Mentioned

titles.ar: بَابُ أَنَّ الْأَئِمَّةَ ( عليهم السلام ) هُمُ الْعَلَامَاتُ الَّتِي ذَكَرَهَا اللَّهُ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ فِي كِتَابِهِ
titles.en: Chapter 17 – The Imamsasws, theyasws are the Signs which Allahazwj Mighty and Majestic Mentioned in Hisazwj Book

titles.ar: بَابُ أَنَّ الْآيَاتِ الَّتِي ذَكَرَهَا اللَّهُ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ فِي كِتَابِهِ هُمُ الْأَئِمَّةُ ( عليهم السلام )
titles.en: Chapter 18 – The Signs which Allahazwj Mighty and Majestic Mentioned in Hisazwj Book, theyasws are the Imamsasws

titles.ar: بَابُ مَا فَرَضَ اللَّهُ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ وَ رَسُولُهُ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) مِنَ الْكَوْنِ مَعَ الْأَئِمَّةِ ( عليهم السلام )
titles.en: Chapter 19 – Whatever Allahazwj Mighty and Majestic and Hisazwj Rasoolsaww Necessitated from the creation, is with the Imamsasws

titles.ar: بَابُ أَنَّ أَهْلَ الذِّكْرِ الَّذِينَ أَمَرَ اللَّهُ الْخَلْقَ بِسُؤَالِهِمْ هُمُ الْأَئِمَّةُ ( عليهم السلام )
titles.en: Chapter 20 – The Ahl Al-Zikr (The People of the Reminder) for whom Allahazwj Commanded the people to be asking themasws, theyasws are the Imamsasws

titles.ar: بَابُ أَنَّ مَنْ وَصَفَهُ اللَّهُ تَعَالَى فِي كِتَابِهِ بِالْعِلْمِ هُمُ الْأَئِمَّةُ ( عليهم السلام )
titles.en: Chapter 21 – The ones whom Allahazwj has Described as being with the knowledge, theyasws are the Imamsasws

titles.ar: بَابُ أَنَّ الرَّاسِخِينَ فِي الْعِلْمِ هُمُ الْأَئِمَّةُ ( عليهم السلام )
titles.en: Chapter 22 – The Ones firmly rooted in knowledge, theyasws are The Imamsasws

titles.ar: بَابُ أَنَّ الْأَئِمَّةَ قَدْ أُوتُوا الْعِلْمَ وَ أُثْبِتَ فِي صُدُورِهِمْ
titles.en: Chapter 23 – The Imamsasws have been Given the Knowledge and Affirmed into theirasws chests

titles.ar: باب فِي أَنَّ مَنِ اصْطَفَاهُ اللَّهُ مِنْ عِبَادِهِ وَ أَوْرَثَهُمْ كِتَابَهُ هُمُ الْأَئِمَّةُ ( عليهم السلام )
titles.en: Chapter 24 – Regarding that the ones whom Allahazwj Chose from Hisazwj servants and Made them to inherit Hisazwj Book, theyasws are the Imamsasws

titles.ar: بَابُ أَنَّ الْأَئِمَّةَ فِي كِتَابِ اللَّهِ إِمَامَانِ إِمَامٌ يَدْعُو إِلَى اللَّهِ وَ إِمَامٌ يَدْعُو إِلَى النَّارِ
titles.en: Chapter 25 – The Imams in the Book of Allahasws are two (types of) Imams – an Imamasws calling to Allahazwj and an imam calling to the Fire
Chapter 26 – The Quran Guides to the Imamsasws

titles.ar: بَابُ أَنَّ النِّعْمَةَ الَّتِي ذَكَرَهَا اللَّهُ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ فِي كِتَابِهِ الْأَئِمَّةُ ( عليهم السلام )
titles.en: Chapter 27 – The Favour (النِّعْمَةَ) which Allahazwj Mighty and Majestic Mentioned in Hisazwj Book, are the Imamsasws

titles.ar: بَابُ أَنَّ الْمُتَوَسِّمِينَ الَّذِينَ ذَكَرَهُمُ اللَّهُ تَعَالَى فِي كِتَابِهِ هُمُ الْأَئِمَّةُ ( عليهم السلام ) وَ السَّبِيلُ فِيهِمْ مُقِيمٌ
titles.en: Chapter 28 – The Distinguishers whom Allahazwj the Exalted Mentioned in Hisazwj Book are the Imamsasws and the straight way among them

titles.ar: بَابُ عَرْضِ الْأَعْمَالِ عَلَى النَّبِيِّ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) وَ الْأَئِمَّةِ ( عليهم السلام )
titles.en: Chapter 29 – The deeds are presented to the Prophetsaww and the Imamsasws

titles.ar: بَابُ أَنَّ الطَّرِيقَةَ الَّتِي حُثَّ عَلَى الِاسْتِقَامَةِ عَلَيْهَا وَلَايَةُ عَلِيٍّ ( عليه السلام ) .
titles.en: Chapter 30 – The doctrine which it is urged to be steadfast upon is Wilayah of Aliasws

titles.ar: بَابُ أَنَّ الْأَئِمَّةَ ( عليهم السلام ) مَعْدِنُ الْعِلْمِ وَ شَجَرَةُ النُّبُوَّةِ وَ مُخْتَلَفُ الْمَلَائِكَةِ
titles.en: Chapter 31 – The Imamsasws are a Mine of Knowledge, and a tree of the Prophet-hood, and interchage of the Angels (where Angels come and go)

titles.ar: بَابُ أَنَّ الْأَئِمَّةَ ( عليهم السلام ) وَرَثَةُ الْعِلْمِ يَرِثُ بَعْضُهُمْ بَعْضاً الْعِلْمَ
titles.en: Chapter 32 – The Imamsasws are the inheritors of the Knowledge, inheriting the Knowledge from each other

titles.ar: بَابُ أَنَّ الْأَئِمَّةَ وَرِثُوا عِلْمَ النَّبِيِّ وَ جَمِيعِ الْأَنْبِيَاءِ وَ الْأَوْصِيَاءِ الَّذِينَ مِنْ قَبْلِهِمْ
titles.en: Chapter 33 – The Imamsasws inherited the Knowledge of the Prophetsaww and of the entirety of the Prophetsas and the successorsas who were from before themasws

titles.ar: بَابُ أَنَّ الْأَئِمَّةَ ( عليهم السلام ) عِنْدَهُمْ جَمِيعُ الْكُتُبِ الَّتِي نَزَلَتْ مِنْ عِنْدِ اللَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ وَ أَنَّهُمْ يَعْرِفُونَهَا عَلَى اخْتِلَافِ أَلْسِنَتِهَا
titles.en: Chapter 34 – The Imamsasws, with themasws are the entirety of the Books which were Revealed from Allahazwj Mighty and Majestic, and theyasws recognise these upon their different languages

titles.ar: بَابُ أَنَّهُ لَمْ يَجْمَعِ الْقُرْآنَ كُلَّهُ إِلَّا الْأَئِمَّةُ ( عليهم السلام ) وَ أَنَّهُمْ يَعْلَمُونَ عِلْمَهُ كُلَّهُ
titles.en: Chapter 35 – No one collected the Quran, all of it, except for the Imamsasws, and theyasws are knowing its Knowledge, all of it

titles.ar: بَابُ مَا أُعْطِيَ الْأَئِمَّةُ ( عليهم السلام ) مِنِ اسْمِ اللَّهِ الْأَعْظَمِ
titles.en: Chapter 36 – What has been Given to the Imamsasws from the Magnificent Name of Allahazwj

titles.ar: بَابُ مَا عِنْدَ الْأَئِمَّةِ مِنْ آيَاتِ الْأَنْبِيَاءِ ( عليهم السلام )
titles.en: Chapter 37 – What is with the Imamsasws from the Signs of the Prophetsas

titles.ar: بَابُ مَا عِنْدَ الْأَئِمَّةِ مِنْ سِلَاحِ رَسُولِ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) وَ مَتَاعِهِ
titles.en: Chapter 38 – What is with the Imamsasws from the weapons of Rasool-Allahsaww and hissaww chattels

titles.ar: بَابُ أَنَّ مَثَلَ سِلَاحِ رَسُولِ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) مَثَلُ التَّابُوتِ فِي بَنِي إِسْرَائِيلَ
titles.en: Chapter 39 – An example of the weapons of Rasool-Allahsaww is an example of the Ark among the Children of Israel

titles.ar: باب فِيهِ ذِكْرُ الصَّحِيفَةِ وَ الْجَفْرِ وَ الْجَامِعَةِ وَ مُصْحَفِ فَاطِمَةَ ( عليها السلام )
titles.en: Chapter 40 – In it is the mention of the Parchment, and the Jaf’r, and the Jami’e, and Parchments of Fatimaasws

titles.ar: باب فِي شَأْنِ إِنَّا أَنْزَلْنَاهُ فِي لَيْلَةِ الْقَدْرِ وَ تَفْسِيرِهَا
titles.en: Chapter 41 – Regarding the glory of [97:1] We have indeed revealed this in the Night of Predestination (Chapter 97) and its interpretation

titles.ar: باب فِي أَنَّ الْأَئِمَّةَ ( عليهم السلام ) يَزْدَادُونَ فِي لَيْلَةِ الْجُمُعَةِ
titles.en: Chapter 42 – Regarding that the Imamsasws are being increased (with knowledge) during the night of Friday

titles.ar: بَابُ لَوْ لَا أَنَّ الْأَئِمَّةَ ( عليهم السلام ) يَزْدَادُونَ لَنَفِدَ مَا عِنْدَهُمْ
titles.en: Chapter 43 – If the Imamsasws were not to be increased, it would deplete what is with themasws

titles.ar: بَابُ أَنَّ الْأَئِمَّةَ ( عليهم السلام ) يَعْلَمُونَ جَمِيعَ الْعُلُومِ الَّتِي خَرَجَتْ إِلَى الْمَلَائِكَةِ وَ الْأَنْبِيَاءِ وَ الرُّسُلِ ( عليهم السلام )
titles.en: Chapter 44 – The Imamsasws are knowing the entirety of the knowledges which came out to the Angels, and the Prophetsas and the Rasoolsas
Chapter 45 – In it is the Mention of the Unseen

titles.ar: بَابُ أَنَّ الْأَئِمَّةَ ( عليهم السلام ) إِذَا شَاءُوا أَنْ يَعْلَمُوا عُلِّمُوا
titles.en: Chapter 46 – The Imamsasws, whenever theyasws desire to know (something), theyasws know (it)

titles.ar: بَابُ أَنَّ الْأَئِمَّةَ ( عليهم السلام ) يَعْلَمُونَ مَتَى يَمُوتُونَ وَ أَنَّهُمْ لَا يَمُوتُونَ إِلَّا بِاخْتِيَارٍ مِنْهُمْ
titles.en: Chapter 47 – The Imamsasws are knowing when theyasws would be passing away, and theyasws are not passing away except by a choice from themasws

titles.ar: بَابُ أَنَّ الْأَئِمَّةَ ( عليهم السلام ) يَعْلَمُونَ عِلْمَ مَا كَانَ وَ مَا يَكُونُ وَ أَنَّهُ لَا يَخْفَى عَلَيْهِمُ الشَّيْ‏ءُ صَلَوَاتُ اللَّهِ عَلَيْهِمْ
titles.en: Chapter 48 – The Imamsasws know the knowledge of whatever has happened, and whatever will be happening, and it is so that nothing is hidden from themasws, may the Salawat of Allahazwj be upon themasws

titles.ar: بَابُ أَنَّ اللَّهَ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ لَمْ يُعَلِّمْ نَبِيَّهُ عِلْماً إِلَّا أَمَرَهُ أَنْ يُعَلِّمَهُ أَمِيرَ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ وَ أَنَّهُ كَانَ شَرِيكَهُ فِي الْعِلْمِ
titles.en: Chapter 49 – Allahazwj Mighty and Majestic did not Teach Hisazwj Prophetsaww a knowledge except that Heazwj Commanded himasws that hesaww teach it to Amir Al-Momineenasws, and heasws was hissaww associate in the knowledge

titles.ar: بَابُ جِهَاتِ عُلُومِ الْأَئِمَّةِ ( عليهم السلام )
titles.en: Chapter 50 – Aspects of the knowledges of the Imamsasws

titles.ar: بَابُ أَنَّ الْأَئِمَّةَ ( عليهم السلام ) لَوْ سُتِرَ عَلَيْهِمْ لَأَخْبَرُوا كُلَّ امْرِئٍ بِمَا لَهُ وَ عَلَيْهِ
titles.en: Chapter 51- The Imamsasws, if secrets would have been kept, theyasws would have informed every person with whatever was for him and against him

titles.ar: بَابُ التَّفْوِيضِ إِلَى رَسُولِ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) وَ إِلَى الْأَئِمَّةِ ( عليهم السلام ) فِي أَمْرِ الدِّينِ
titles.en: Chapter 52 – The Authorising to Rasool-Allahsaww and to the Imamsasws regarding the command of the Religion

titles.ar: باب فِي أَنَّ الْأَئِمَّةَ بِمَنْ يُشْبِهُونَ مِمَّنْ مَضَى وَ كَرَاهِيَةِ الْقَوْلِ فِيهِمْ بِالنُّبُوَّةِ
titles.en: Chapter 53 – Regarding that the Imamsasws are resembling with the ones from the past and the abhorrence of the speech regarding themasws being with the Prophet-hood

titles.ar: بَابُ أَنَّ الْأَئِمَّةَ ( عليهم السلام ) مُحَدَّثُونَ مُفَهَّمُونَ
titles.en: Chapter 54 – The Imamsasws are Muhaddisoun (ones discussing with the Angels), understaning ones

titles.ar: باب فِيهِ ذِكْرُ الْأَرْوَاحِ الَّتِي فِي الْأَئِمَّةِ ( عليهم السلام )
titles.en: Chapter 55 – Regarding the mention of the spirits within the Imamsasws

titles.ar: بَابُ الرُّوحِ الَّتِي يُسَدِّدُ اللَّهُ بِهَا الْأَئِمَّةَ ( عليهم السلام )
titles.en: Chapter 56 – The spirit by which Allahazwj Protects the Imamsasws

titles.ar: بَابُ وَقْتِ مَا يَعْلَمُ الْإِمَامُ جَمِيعَ عِلْمِ الْإِمَامِ الَّذِي كَانَ قَبْلَهُ ( عليه السلام )
titles.en: Chapter 57 – The time when the Imamasws learns the entirety of the knowledge of the Imamasws who was before himasws

titles.ar: باب فِي أَنَّ الْأَئِمَّةَ صَلَوَاتُ اللَّهِ عَلَيْهِمْ فِي الْعِلْمِ وَ الشَّجَاعَةِ وَ الطَّاعَةِ سَوَاءٌ
titles.en: Chapter 58 – The Imamsasws are equal regarding the knowledge, and the bravery, and the (Obligated) obedience

titles.ar: بَابُ أَنَّ الْإِمَامَ ( عليه السلام ) يَعْرِفُ الْإِمَامَ الَّذِي يَكُونُ مِنْ بَعْدِهِ وَ أَنَّ قَوْلَ اللَّهِ تَعَالَى إِنَّ اللَّهَ يَأْمُرُكُمْ أَنْ تُؤَدُّوا الْأَماناتِ إِلى أَهْلِها فِيهِمْ ( عليهم السلام ) نَزَلَتْ
titles.en: Chapter 59 – The Imamsasws recognises the Imamsas who would happen to be from after himasws, and that the Words of Allahazwj the Exalted [4:58] Surely Allah Commands you to make over trusts to their owners, it was Revealed regarding themasws

titles.ar: بَابُ أَنَّ الْإِمَامَةَ عَهْدٌ مِنَ اللَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ مَعْهُودٌ مِنْ وَاحِدٍ إِلَى وَاحِدٍ ( عليهم السلام )
titles.en: Chapter 60 – The Imamate is a Covenant from Allahazwj Mighty and Majestic, Covenanted from oneasws to oneasws

titles.ar: بَابُ أَنَّ الْأَئِمَّةَ ( عليهم السلام ) لَمْ يَفْعَلُوا شَيْئاً وَ لَا يَفْعَلُونَ إِلَّا بِعَهْدٍ مِنَ اللَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ وَ أَمْرٍ مِنْهُ لَا يَتَجَاوَزُونَهُ
titles.en: Chapter 61 – The Imamsasws are not doing anything nor will theyasws be doing (anything) except by a Covenant from Allahazwj Mighty and Majestic and a Command from Himazwj, not exceeding it

titles.ar: بَابُ الْأُمُورِ الَّتِي تُوجِبُ حُجَّةَ الْإِمَامِ ( عليه السلام )
titles.en: Chapter 62 – The matters which are inevitable for the Divine Authority of the Imamasws

titles.ar: بَابُ ثَبَاتِ الْإِمَامَةِ فِي الْأَعْقَابِ وَ أَنَّهَا لَا تَعُودُ فِي أَخٍ وَ لَا عَمٍّ وَ لَا غَيْرِهِمَا مِنَ الْقَرَابَاتِ
titles.en: Chapter 63 – The continuation of the Imamate be in the descendants and that it would not be returning to be in a brother, nor a paternal uncle nor any other from the relatives

titles.ar: بَابُ مَا نَصَّ اللَّهُ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ وَ رَسُولُهُ عَلَى الْأَئِمَّةِ ( عليهم السلام ) وَاحِداً فَوَاحِداً
titles.en: Chapter 64 – What was Stipulated by Allahazwj Mighty and Majestic and Hisazwj Rasoolsaww upon the Imamsasws, one then one

titles.ar: بَابُ الْإِشَارَةِ وَ النَّصِّ عَلَى أَمِيرِ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ ( عليه السلام )
titles.en: Chapter 65 – The Indication and the wordings upon Amir Al Momineenasws

titles.ar: بَابُ الْإِشَارَةِ وَ النَّصِّ عَلَى الْحَسَنِ بْنِ عَلِيٍّ ( عليه السلام )
titles.en: Chapter 66 – The Indication and the wordings upon Al-Hassanasws Bin Aliasws

titles.ar: بَابُ الْإِشَارَةِ وَ النَّصِّ عَلَى الْحُسَيْنِ بْنِ عَلِيٍّ ( عليه السلام )
titles.en: Chapter 67 – The Indication and the wordings upon Al-Husaynasws Bin Aliasws

titles.ar: بَابُ الْإِشَارَةِ وَ النَّصِّ عَلَى عَلِيِّ بْنِ الْحُسَيْنِ صَلَوَاتُ اللَّهِ عَلَيْهِمَا
titles.en: Chapter 68 – The Indication and the wordings upon Aliasws Bin Al-Husaynasws

titles.ar: بَابُ الْإِشَارَةِ وَ النَّصِّ عَلَى أَبِي جَعْفَرٍ ( عليه السلام )
titles.en: Chapter 69 – The Indication and the wordings upon Abu Ja’farasws

titles.ar: بَابُ الْإِشَارَةِ وَ النَّصِّ عَلَى أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ جَعْفَرِ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ الصَّادِقِ صَلَوَاتُ اللَّهِ عَلَيْهِمَا
titles.en: Chapter 70 – The Indication and the wordings upon Abu Abdullah Ja’farasws Bin Muhammad Al-Sadiqasws

titles.ar: بَابُ الْإِشَارَةِ وَ النَّصِّ عَلَى أَبِي الْحَسَنِ مُوسَى ( عليه السلام )
titles.en: Chapter 71 – The Indication and the wordings upon Abu Al-Hassan Musaasws

titles.ar: بَابُ الْإِشَارَةِ وَ النَّصِّ عَلَى أَبِي الْحَسَنِ الرِّضَا ( عليه السلام )
titles.en: Chapter 72 – The Indication and the wordings upon Abu Al-Hassan Al-Rezaasws

titles.ar: بَابُ الْإِشَارَةِ وَ النَّصِّ عَلَى أَبِي جَعْفَرٍ الثَّانِي ( عليه السلام )
titles.en: Chapter 73 – The Indication and the wordings upon Abu Ja’farasws the 2nd (9th Imamasws)

titles.ar: بَابُ الْإِشَارَةِ وَ النَّصِّ عَلَى أَبِي الْحَسَنِ الثَّالِثِ ( عليه السلام )
titles.en: Chapter 74 – The Indication and the wordings upon Abu Al-Hassanasws the 3rd. (10th Imamasws)

titles.ar: بَابُ الْإِشَارَةِ وَ النَّصِّ عَلَى أَبِي مُحَمَّدٍ ( عليه السلام )
titles.en: Chapter 75 – The Indication and the wordings upon Abu Muhammadasws (11th Imamasws)

titles.ar: بَابُ الْإِشَارَةِ وَ النَّصِّ إِلَى صَاحِبِ الدَّارِ ( عليه السلام )
titles.en: Chapter 76 – The Indication and the wordings upon the Masterasws of the world (12th Imamasws)

titles.ar: باب فِي تَسْمِيَةِ مَنْ رَآهُ ( عليه السلام )
titles.en: Chapter 77 – Regarding the naming of the ones who saw himasws
Chapter 78 – Regaring the forbiddance from the name
Chapter 79 – Miscellaneous regarding the state of the Occultation
Chapter 80 – Regarding the Occulation

titles.ar: بَابُ مَا يُفْصَلُ بِهِ بَيْنَ دَعْوَى الْمُحِقِّ وَ الْمُبْطِلِ فِي أَمْرِ الْإِمَامَةِ
titles.en: Chapter 81 – What can be decided with between the truthful and the false claimant regarding the matter of the Imamate
Chapter 82 – The abhorrence of the timing (of the re-appearance of Imam Al Mahdiasws)
Chapter 83 – The vetting and the examination

titles.ar: بَابُ أَنَّهُ مَنْ عَرَفَ إِمَامَهُ لَمْ يَضُرَّهُ تَقَدَّمَ هَذَا الْأَمْرُ أَوْ تَأَخَّرَ
titles.en: Chapter 84 – The one who recognises his Imamasws, it would not harm him whether this matter (Rising of Al-Qaimasws) is brought forward or delayed

titles.ar: بَابُ مَنِ ادَّعَى الْإِمَامَةَ وَ لَيْسَ لَهَا بِأَهْلٍ وَ مَنْ جَحَدَ الْأَئِمَّةَ أَوْ بَعْضَهُمْ وَ مَنْ أَثْبَتَ الْإِمَامَةَ لِمَنْ لَيْسَ لَهَا بِأَهْلٍ
titles.en: Chapter 85 – The one who claims the Imamate and he is not rightful for it, and the one who denies the Imamsasws, or some of themasws, and the one who affirms the Imamate for the one who is not rightful for it

titles.ar: باب فِيمَنْ دَانَ اللَّهَ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ بِغَيْرِ إِمَامٍ مِنَ اللَّهِ جَلَّ جَلَالُهُ
titles.en: Chapter 86 – Regading the one who makes it a Religion of Allahazwj Mighty and Majestic without an Imamasws from Allahazwj, Majestic is Hisazwj Majesty

titles.ar: بَابُ مَنْ مَاتَ وَ لَيْسَ لَهُ إِمَامٌ مِنْ أَئِمَّةِ الْهُدَى وَ هُوَ مِنَ الْبَابِ الْأَوَّلِ
titles.en: Chapter 87 – The one who dies and there isn’t an Imamasws for him from the Imamsasws of Guidance – and it is from the first chapter (above)

titles.ar: باب فِيمَنْ عَرَفَ الْحَقَّ مِنْ أَهْلِ الْبَيْتِ وَ مَنْ أَنْكَرَ
titles.en: Chapter 88 – Regarding the one who recognises the truth from the Peopleasws of the Household and the one who denies

titles.ar: بَابُ مَا يَجِبُ عَلَى النَّاسِ عِنْدَ مُضِيِّ الْإِمَامِ
titles.en: Chapter 89 – What is Obligated upon the people during the passing away of the Imamasws

titles.ar: باب فِي أَنَّ الْإِمَامَ مَتَى يَعْلَمُ أَنَّ الْأَمْرَ قَدْ صَارَ إِلَيْهِ
titles.en: Chapter 90 – Regarding the Imamasws, when does heasws know that the command has come to himasws

titles.ar: باب حَالَاتِ الْأَئِمَّةِ ( عليهم السلام ) فِي السِّنِّ
titles.en: Chapter 91 – States of the Imamsasws regarding the age

titles.ar: باب أَنَّ الْإِمَامَ لَا يَغْسِلُهُ إِلَّا إِمَامٌ مِنَ الْأَئِمَّةِ ( عليهم السلام )
titles.en: Chapter 92 – The Imamasws is such that none can wash himasws (funeral wash) except an Imamasws from the Imamsasws
Chapter 93 – The Coming (to the World) of the Imamsasws

titles.ar: باب خَلْقِ أَبْدَانِ الْأَئِمَّةِ وَ أَرْوَاحِهِمْ وَ قُلُوبِهِمْ ( عليهم السلام )
titles.en: Chapter 94 – The Creation of the Imamsasws, and their spirits and theirasws hearts
Chapter 95 – The The submission and the merits of the submitters

titles.ar: باب أَنَّ الْوَاجِبَ عَلَى النَّاسِ بَعْدَ مَا يَقْضُونَ مَنَاسِكَهُمْ أَنْ يَأْتُوا الْإِمَامَ فَيَسْأَلُونَهُ عَنْ مَعَالِمِ دِينِهِمْ وَ يُعْلِمُونَهُمْ وَلَايَتَهُمْ وَ مَوَدَّتَهُمْ لَهُ
titles.en: Chapter 96 – The Obligation upon the people, after having fulfilled their rituals (of Hajj), that they should come to the Imamasws, so they should be asking himasws about the information about their Religion, and they should be letting himasws know of their Wilayah and their cordiality for himasws

titles.ar: باب أَنَّ الْأَئِمَّةَ تَدْخُلُ الْمَلَائِكَةُ بُيُوتَهُمْ وَ تَطَأُ بُسُطَهُمْ وَ تَأْتِيهِمْ بِالْأَخْبَارِ ( عليهم السلام )
titles.en: Chapter 97 – The Imamsasws are such that the Angels come over to them and tread their furnishings and come to themasws with the news

titles.ar: باب أَنَّ الْجِنَّ يَأْتِيهِمْ فَيَسْأَلُونَهُمْ عَنْ مَعَالِمِ دِينِهِمْ وَ يَتَوَجَّهُونَ فِي أُمُورِهِمْ
titles.en: Chapter 98 – The Jinn come to them (Imamsasws), so they are asking themasws about the information of their Religion, and they are betaking to their orders

titles.ar: باب فِي الْأَئِمَّةِ ( عليهم السلام ) أَنَّهُمْ إِذَا ظَهَرَ أَمْرُهُمْ حَكَمُوا بِحُكْمِ دَاوُدَ وَ آلِ دَاوُدَ وَ لَا يَسْأَلُونَ الْبَيِّنَةَ عَلَيْهِمُ السَّلَامُ وَ الرَّحْمَةُ وَ الرِّضْوَانُ
titles.en: Chapter 99 – Regarding the Imamsasws that theyasws, when theirasws command appears, theyasws would be judging by the judgment of Dawoodas and the Progeny of Dawoodas, and theyasws would not be asking for the proof, upon themasws be the greetings, and the Mercy, and the (Divine) Pleasure.

titles.ar: باب أَنَّ مُسْتَقَى الْعِلْمِ مِنْ بَيْتِ آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ ( عليهم السلام )
titles.en: Chapter 100 – The Knowledge is derived from the Houshold of the Progenyasws of Muhammadsaww

titles.ar: باب أَنَّهُ لَيْسَ شَيْ‏ءٌ مِنَ الْحَقِّ فِي يَدِ النَّاسِ إِلَّا مَا خَرَجَ مِنْ عِنْدِ الْأَئِمَّةِ ( عليهم السلام ) وَ أَنَّ كُلَّ شَيْ‏ءٍ لَمْ يَخْرُجْ مِنْ عِنْدِهِمْ فَهُوَ بَاطِلٌ
titles.en: Chapter 101 – There is nothing in the hands of the people from the truth except what came out from the presence of the Imamsasws, and that every thing which did not come out from themasws, so it is false

titles.ar: باب فِيمَا جَاءَ أَنَّ حَدِيثَهُمْ صَعْبٌ مُسْتَصْعَبٌ
titles.en: Chapter 102 – Regarding what has come that their Ahadeeth are difficult, becoming more difficult

titles.ar: باب مَا أَمَرَ النَّبِيُّ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) بِالنَّصِيحَةِ لِأَئِمَّةِ الْمُسْلِمِينَ وَ اللُّزُومِ لِجَمَاعَتِهِمْ وَ مَنْ هُمْ
titles.en: Chapter 103 – What the Prophetsaww ordered with the advice of the Imamsasws of the Muslims and the necessitation to theirasws gatherings, and who theyasws are

titles.ar: باب مَا يَجِبُ مِنْ حَقِّ الْإِمَامِ عَلَى الرَّعِيَّةِ وَ حَقِّ الرَّعِيَّةِ عَلَى الْإِمَامِ
titles.en: Chapter 104 – What is Obligated from the rights of the Imamasws upon the citizen and the rights of the citizen upon the Imamasws

titles.ar: باب أَنَّ الْأَرْضَ كُلَّهَا لِلْإِمَامِ ( عليه السلام )
titles.en: Chapter 105 – The earth, all of it, is for the Imamasws

titles.ar: باب سِيرَةِ الْإِمَامِ فِي نَفْسِهِ وَ فِي المَطْعَمِ وَ الْمَلْبَسِ إِذَا وَلِيَ الْأَمْرَ
titles.en: Chapter 106 – The ways of the Imamasws regarding himselfasws and regarding the meals and the clothing when heasws is the Masterasws of the Command
Chapter 107 - Miscellaneous

titles.en: Chapter 108 – Points and pickings from the Revelation regarding the Wilayah

titles.en: Chapter 110 – Regarding theirasws recognising theirasws friends and the Authorisation to themasws

titles.en: Chapter 113 – Nazool (Arrival) of Amir Al-Momineenasws

titles.ar: باب مَوْلِدِ الْحَسَنِ بْنِ عَلِيٍّ صَلَوَاتُ اللَّهِ عَلَيْهِمَا
titles.en: Chapter 115 – The Nazool (Arrival) of Al-Hassanasws Bin Aliasws, may the Salawat of Allahazwj be upon themasws

titles.ar: باب مَوْلِدِ الْحُسَيْنِ بْنِ عَلِيٍّ ( عليه السلام )

titles.ar: باب مَوْلِدِ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ جَعْفَرِ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ ( عليه السلام )

titles.ar: باب مَوْلِدِ أَبِي الْحَسَنِ مُوسَى بْنِ جَعْفَرٍ ( عليه السلام )

titles.ar: باب مَوْلِدِ أَبِي جَعْفَرٍ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عَلِيٍّ الثَّانِي ( عليه السلام )

Chapter 6 – The man informing his brother of his love (for him)
Chapter 7 – The Greeting

titles.ar: بَابُ مَنْ يَجِبُ أَنْ يَبْدَأَ بِالسَّلَامِ
titles.en: Chapter 8 – The one on whom it is Obligatory that he begins with the greeting (السَّلَامُ)

titles.ar: بَابُ إِذَا سَلَّمَ وَاحِدٌ مِنَ الْجَمَاعَةِ أَجْزَأَهُمْ وَ إِذَا رَدَّ وَاحِدٌ مِنَ الْجَمَاعَةِ أَجْزَأَ عَنْهُمْ
titles.en: Chapter 9 – When one from a group greets, it would suffice for (all) of them, and if one of the group responds, it would suffice for (all) of them

Chapter 11 – The greeting (السَّلَامُ) upon the people of the (other) Religions
Chapter 12 – Contracts of the people under the responsibility (Ahl Al-Zimma)
Chapter 13 – The overlooking (of faults)
Chapter 14 - Miscellaneous
Chapter 15 – The sneezing and the Naming (of Allahazwj)

titles.ar: بَابُ وُجُوبِ إِجْلَالِ ذِي الشَّيْبَةِ الْمُسْلِمِ
titles.en: Chapter 16 – The Obligation of respecting the Muslim with old age
Chapter 17 – Honouring the honourable
Chapter 18 – The right of a comer
Chapter 19 – The gatherings are with the confidentiality
Chapter 20 – Regarding the whispering
Chapter 21 – The Sitting (postures)
Chapter 22 – The reclining and the folded (postures)
Chapter 23 – The humour and the laughter
Chapter 24 – Rights of the neighbours
Chapter 25 – Limit of the neighbourhood

titles.ar: بَابُ حُسْنِ الصِّحَابَةِ وَ حَقِّ الصَّاحِبِ فِي السَّفَرِ
titles.en: Chapter 26 - Good companionship and the right of the companion during the journey
Chapter 27 – Correspondence
Chapter 28 – The Miscellaneous
Chapter 29 – A Chapter

titles.ar: بَابُ النَّهْيِ عَنْ إِحْرَاقِ الْقَرَاطِيسِ الْمَكْتُوبَةِ
titles.en: Chapter 30 – The prohibition from burning the written papers
Chapter 1 – The cleansing of water

titles.ar: باب الْمَاءِ الَّذِي لَا يُنَجِّسُهُ شَيْ‏ءٌ

titles.en: Chapter 3 – The water which happens to be little, and the water wherein is the carcass, and the man goes to the water and his hands are dirty

titles.ar: باب الْبِئْرِ وَ مَا يَقَعُ فِيهَا
titles.en: Chapter 4 – The water well and what falls into it

titles.en: Chapter 5 – The well which happens to be to the side of the cesspool

titles.ar: باب الْوُضُوءِ مِنْ سُؤْرِ الدَّوَابِّ وَ السِّبَاعِ وَ الطَّيْرِ
titles.en: Chapter 6 – The Ablution (Wudhu) from the residue (of the water of) the animals, and the predators, and the birds

titles.ar: باب الْوُضُوءِ مِنْ سُؤْرِ الْحَائِضِ وَ الْجُنُبِ وَ الْيَهُودِيِّ وَ النَّصْرَانِيِّ وَ النَّاصِبِ

titles.en: Chapter 8 – The man enters his hand into the vessel before he washes it, and the limit with regards to washing of the two hands from the sexual impurity, and the urine, and the faeces, and the sleep

titles.ar: باب اخْتِلَاطِ مَاءِ الْمَطَرِ بِالْبَوْلِ وَ مَا يَرْجِعُ فِي الْإِنَاءِ مِنْ غُسَالَةِ الْجُنُبِ وَ الرَّجُلِ يَقَعُ ثَوْبُهُ عَلَى الْمَاءِ الَّذِي يَسْتَنْجِي بِهِ

titles.ar: باب الْمَوْضِعِ الَّذِي يُكْرَهُ أَنْ يُتَغَوَّطَ فِيهِ أَوْ يُبَالَ

titles.ar: باب الْقَوْلِ عِنْدَ دُخُولِ الْخَلَاءِ وَ عِنْدَ الْخُرُوجِ وَ الِاسْتِنْجَاءِ وَ مَنْ نَسِيَهُ وَ التَّسْمِيَةِ عِنْدَ الدُّخُولِ وَ عِنْدَ الْوُضُوءِ
titles.en: Chapter 12 – The words (to be spoken) during entering the toilet, and during the exit, and the cleansing (afterwards), and the one who forgets, and Naming (Bismillah) during the entering and during the Ablution (Wudhu)

titles.ar: باب الِاسْتِبْرَاءِ مِنَ الْبَوْلِ وَ غَسْلِهِ وَ مَنْ لَمْ يَجِدِ الْمَاءَ

titles.en: Chapter 14 – Measurement of the water which suffices for the Ablution (Wudhu) and the washing, the one who exceeds in the Ablution (Wudhu)
Chapter 15 – The teeth brushing
Chapter 16 – The rinsing of the mouth and the sniffing (of the water)
Chapter 17 – Description of the Ablution (Wudhu)

titles.ar: باب حَدِّ الْوَجْهِ الَّذِي يُغْسَلُ وَ الذِّرَاعَيْنِ وَ كَيْفَ يُغْسَلُ
titles.en: Chapter 18 – Limit of the face which should be washed, and the two arms, and how to wash
Chapter 19 – Wiping the head and the two feet
Chapter 20 – Wiping (over) the shoes

titles.ar: باب الْجَبَائِرِ وَ الْقُرُوحِ وَ الْجِرَاحَاتِ
titles.en: Chapter 21 – The splints, and the sores, and the wounds

titles.ar: باب الشَّكِّ فِي الْوُضُوءِ وَ مَنْ نَسِيَهُ أَوْ قَدَّمَ أَوْ أَخَّرَ
titles.en: Chapter 22 – The doubt in the Ablution (Wudhu) and the one who forgets it or brings something forward or delays

titles.ar: باب الرَّجُلِ يَطَأُ عَلَى الْعَذِرَةِ أَوْ غَيْرِهَا مِنَ الْقَذَرِ
titles.en: Chapter 24 – The man treads upon the faeces or other than it, from the filth
Chapter 25 – The seminal fluid and the semen
Chapter 26 – Types of washing

titles.ar: باب مَا يُجْزِئُ الْغُسْلُ مِنْهُ إِذَا اجْتَمَعَ
titles.en: Chapter 27 – What the washing suffices from when (the matters) gather
Chapter 28 – Obligation of the washing for the day of Friday

titles.ar: باب صِفَةِ الْغُسْلِ وَ الْوُضُوءِ قَبْلَهُ وَ بَعْدَهُ وَ الرَّجُلِ يَغْتَسِلُ فِي مَكَانٍ غَيْرِ طَيِّبٍ وَ مَا يُقَالُ عِنْدَ الْغُسْلِ وَ تَحْوِيلِ الْخَاتَمِ عِنْدَ الْغُسْلِ
titles.en: Chapter 29 – Description of the washing, and the Ablution (Wudhu) before it and after it, and the man washing in a place other than good, and what is to be said during the washing, and turning of the ring during the washing

titles.en: Chapter 30 – What Obligates the washing upon the man and the woman
Chapter 31 – The bed-wetting of the man and the woman

titles.ar: باب الرَّجُلِ وَ الْمَرْأَةِ يَغْتَسِلَانِ مِنَ الْجَنَابَةِ ثُمَّ يَخْرُجُ مِنْهُمَا شَيْ‏ءٌ بَعْدَ الْغُسْلِ
titles.en: Chapter 32 – The man and the woman both wash from the sexual impurity, then something comes out from them after the washing

titles.ar: باب الْجُنُبِ يَأْكُلُ وَ يَشْرَبُ وَ يَقْرَأُ وَ يَدْخُلُ الْمَسْجِدَ وَ يَخْتَضِبُ وَ يَدَّهِنُ وَ يَطَّلِي وَ يَحْتَجِمُ

titles.ar: باب الْبَوْلِ يُصِيبُ الثَّوْبَ أَوِ الْجَسَدَ

Chapter 37 – The urine of the animals and their droppings

titles.ar: باب الْكَلْبِ يُصِيبُ الثَّوْبَ وَ الْجَسَدَ وَ غَيْرَهُ مِمَّا يُكْرَهُ أَنْ يُمَسَّ شَيْ‏ءٌ مِنْهُ

Chapter 40 – Description of Tayammum (Performing Ablution (Wudhu) with dust in lieu of water)

titles.en: Chapter 45 – The one with a broken (limb), and the one with pockmarks, and the one with the injuries, and they are hit by the sexual impurity
Chapter 46 – Miscellaneous
Chapter 1 – The Menstruation (Haydh)

titles.ar: باب أَدْنَى الْحَيْضِ وَ أَقْصَاهُ وَ أَدْنَى الطُّهْرِ
titles.en: Chapter 2 – The minimum of the menstruation (Haydh), and its maximum, and the minimum of the purity

titles.ar: باب الْمَرْأَةِ تَرَى الدَّمَ قَبْلَ أَيَّامِهَا أَوْ بَعْدَ طُهْرِهَا
titles.en: Chapter 3 – The woman sees the blood before her (regular) days, or after her purity

titles.ar: باب الْمَرْأَةِ تَرَى الصُّفْرَةَ قَبْلَ الْحَيْضِ أَوْ بَعْدَهُ
titles.en: Chapter 4 – The woman sees the yellowness before the menstruation (Haydh), or after it
Chapter 5 – The first (menstruation (Haydh) which the woman menstruates
Chapter 6 – The absolution of the menstruating woman

titles.ar: باب غُسْلِ الْحَائِضِ وَ مَا يُجْزِئُهَا مِنَ الْمَاءِ
titles.en: Chapter 7 – The washing of the menstruating woman, and what would suffice her from the water

titles.ar: باب الْمَرْأَةِ تَرَى الدَّمَ وَ هِيَ جُنُبٌ
titles.en: Chapter 8 – The woman sees the blood and she is with sexual impurity

titles.ar: باب جَامِعٌ فِي الْحَائِضِ وَ الْمُسْتَحَاضَةِ
titles.en: Chapter 9 – The comprehensive regarding the menstruation (Haydh) and the inter-period bleeding (Istihaaza)

titles.ar: باب مَعْرِفَةِ دَمِ الْحَيْضِ مِنْ دَمِ الِاسْتِحَاضَةِ
titles.en: Chapter 10 – Recognition of the menstruation (Haydh) blood from the inter-period bleeding (Istihaaza)

titles.ar: باب مَعْرِفَةِ دَمِ الْحَيْضِ وَ الْعُذْرَةِ وَ الْقَرْحَةِ
titles.en: Chapter 11 – Recognition of the blood of menstruation (Haydh), and the virginity, and the ulcers
Chapter 12 – The pregnant woman sees the blood
Chapter 13 – The post-childbirth bleeding (Nafsa’a)

titles.ar: باب النُّفَسَاءِ تَطْهُرُ ثُمَّ تَرَى الدَّمَ أَوْ رَأَتِ الدَّمَ قَبْلَ أَنْ تَلِدَ
titles.en: Chapter 14 – The woman with post-childbirth bleeding (Nafsa’a) (becomes) clean, then she sees the blood, or saw the blood before she gave birth

titles.ar: باب مَا يَجِبُ عَلَى الْحَائِضِ فِي أَوْقَاتِ الصَّلَاةِ
titles.en: Chapter 15 – What is Obligated upon the menstruating woman during her Salaat times

titles.ar: باب الْمَرْأَةِ تَحِيضُ بَعْدَ دُخُولِ وَقْتِ الصَّلَاةِ قَبْلَ أَنْ تُصَلِّيَهَا أَوْ تَطْهُرُ قَبْلَ دُخُولِ وَقْتِهَا فَتَتَوَانَى فِي الْغُسْلِ

titles.ar: باب الْمَرْأَةِ تَكُونُ فِي الصَّلَاةِ فَتَحُسُّ بِالْحَيْضِ

titles.ar: باب الْحَائِضِ تَقْضِي الصَّوْمَ وَ لَا تَقْضِي الصَّلَاةَ
titles.en: Chapter 18 – The menstruating woman would make up the (missed) Fasts and she would not make up the (missed) Salaats

titles.ar: باب الْحَائِضِ وَ النُّفَسَاءِ تَقْرَءَانِ الْقُرْآنَ
titles.en: Chapter 19 – The menstruating woman and the one with post-childbirth bleeding (Nafsa’a), reciting the Quran

titles.ar: باب الْحَائِضِ تَأْخُذُ مِنَ الْمَسْجِدِ وَ لَا تَضَعُ فِيهِ شَيْئاً
titles.en: Chapter 20 – The Menstruating woman can take something from the Masjid and she cannot place anything in it

titles.ar: باب الْمَرْأَةِ يَرْتَفِعُ طَمْثُهَا ثُمَّ يَعُودُ وَ حَدِّ الْيَأْسِ مِنَ الْمَحِيضِ
titles.en: Chapter 21 – The woman’s menstruation (Haydh) is raised, then it returns, and a limit of the despair from the menstruation (Haydh) (menopause)

titles.ar: باب الْمَرْأَةِ يَرْتَفِعُ طَمْثُهَا مِنْ عِلَّةٍ فَتُسْقَى الدَّوَاءَ لِيَعُودَ طَمْثُهَا
titles.en: Chapter 22 – The woman whose menstruation (Haydh) is raised due to illness, so she drinks the medicine in order for her menstruation (Haydh) to return
Chapter 23 – The menstruating woman dyes (hair)
Chapter 24 – Washing the clothes of the menstruating woman

titles.ar: باب الْحَائِضِ تُنَاوِلُ الْخُمْرَةَ أَوِ الْمَاءَ
titles.en: Chapter 25 – The menstruating woman fetching the prayer-mat, or the water

titles.ar: باب عِلَلِ الْمَوْتِ وَ أَنَّ الْمُؤْمِنَ يَمُوتُ بِكُلِّ مِيتَةٍ
titles.en: Chapter 1 – Causes of the death, and that the Believer dies with every (type of) death
Chapter 2 – Rewards of the sick one
Chapter 3 – Another chapter from it
Chapter 4 – The limit of complaints
Chapter 5 – The sick one permitting the people (to visit him)

titles.ar: باب فِي كَمْ يُعَادُ الْمَرِيضُ وَ قَدْرِ مَا يَجْلِسُ عِنْدَهُ وَ تَمَامِ الْعِيَادَةِ
titles.en: Chapter 6 – Regarding how many times to visit the patient, and for how long to sit in his presence, and the completion of the consoling
Chapter 7 – A limit of the sudden death
Chapter 8 – Rewards for visiting the sick
Chapter 9 – Indoctrination (Talqeen) of the deceased

titles.ar: باب إِذَا عَسُرَ عَلَى الْمَيِّتِ الْمَوْتُ وَ اشْتَدَّ عَلَيْهِ النَّزْعُ
titles.en: Chapter 10 – When the death is difficult upon the dying one and the pangs are intense upon him
Chapter 11 – Diverting the deceased to face the Qiblah

titles.ar: باب أَنَّ الْمُؤْمِنَ لَا يَكْرَهُ عَلَى قَبْضِ رُوحِهِ
titles.en: Chapter 12 – The Believer does not dislike the capture of his soul

titles.ar: باب مَا يُعَايِنُ الْمُؤْمِنُ وَ الْكَافِرُ
titles.en: Chapter 13 – What the Believer and the Infidel see

titles.ar: باب إِخْرَاجِ رُوحِ الْمُؤْمِنِ وَ الْكَافِرِ
titles.en: Chapter 14 – The extraction of the soul of the Believer and the Infidel
Chapter 15 – Hastening the burial
Chapter 16 – Miscellaneous
Chapter 17 – The menstruating woman looking after the sick
Chapter 18 – Washing the deceased
Chapter 19 – Embalming the deceased and his enshrouding
Chapter 20 – Enshrouding the woman

titles.ar: باب كَرَاهِيَةِ تَجْمِيرِ الْكَفَنِ وَ تَسْخِينِ الْمَاءِ
titles.en: Chapter 21 – Abhorrence of burning the incense for the shroud and warming the water

titles.en: Chapter 25 – The dying one is dying and he is with sexual impurity, or a menstruating woman, or a woman with post-childbirth bleeding

Chapter 33 – Rewards of the one who washes a Believer
Chapter 34 – Rewards of the one who enshrouds a Believer

Chapter 38 – The words (to be spoken) during seeing the funeral (coffin)
Chapter 39 – The Sunnah regarding carrying the coffin
Chapter 40 – The walking with the coffin
Chapter 41 – Abhorrence of the riding with the coffin

Chapter 84 – Regarding the comfort

Chapter 94 – The children

Chapter 1 – The merit of (Salāt)

Chapter 33 – The one whose ablution breaks before Salām (the greeting at the end of Salāt)
Chapter 34 – The mistake during the commencement of the Salāt
Chapter 35 – The mistake during the recitation
Chapter 36 – The mistake during the Rukū
Chapter 37 – The omission in the Sajdah
Chapter 38 – The omission in the two first Rak’at

titles.ar: باب السَّهْوِ فِي الْفَجْرِ وَ الْمَغْرِبِ وَ الْجُمُعَةِ
titles.en: Chapter 39 – The omission in Al-Fajr, and Al-Maghrib and the Friday (Salāts)

titles.ar: باب مَنْ سَهَا فِي الْأَرْبَعِ وَ الْخَمْسِ وَ لَمْ يَدْرِ زَادَ أَوْ نَقَصَ أَوِ اسْتَيْقَنَ أَنَّهُ زَادَ
titles.en: Chapter 41 – The one who omits in the fourth and the fifth and does not know he has exceeded or is deficient, or he is convinced that he has exceeded

titles.ar: باب مَنْ تَكَلَّمَ فِي صَلَاتِهِ أَوِ انْصَرَفَ قَبْلَ أَنْ يُتِمَّهَا أَوْ يَقُومُ فِي مَوْضِعِ الْجُلُوسِ
titles.en: Chapter 42 – The one who speaks during his Salāt, or leaves before he completes it, or stands in place of the sitting

titles.ar: باب مَنْ شَكَّ فِي صَلَاتِهِ كُلِّهَا وَ لَمْ يَدْرِ زَادَ أَوْ نَقَصَ وَ مَنْ كَثُرَ عَلَيْهِ السَّهْوُ وَ السَّهْوِ فِي النَّافِلَةِ وَ سَهْوِ الْإِمَامِ وَ مَنْ خَلْفَهُ
titles.en: Chapter 43 – The one who doubts in his Salāt, all of it, and does not know whether he has increased or reduced, and the one upon whom the omissions are numerous, and the omissions in the optional (Salāts), and the omission of the prayer leader, and the one behind him

titles.ar: باب مَا يُقْبَلُ مِنْ صَلَاةِ السَّاهِي
titles.en: Chapter 44 – What is Acceptable from the Salāt of an omitter

titles.ar: باب مَا يَقْطَعُ الصَّلَاةَ مِنَ الضَّحِكِ وَ الْحَدَثِ وَ الْإِشَارَةِ وَ النِّسْيَانِ وَ غَيْرِ ذَلِكَ
titles.en: Chapter 45 – What cuts off the Salāt, from the laugh, and the breaking of the ablution, and the gesture, and the forgetfulness, and other than that

titles.ar: باب التَّسْلِيمِ عَلَى الْمُصَلِّي وَ الْعُطَاسِ فِي الصَّلَاةِ
titles.en: Chapter 46 – The greetings upon the praying one, and the sneezing during the Salāt

titles.ar: باب الْمُصَلِّي يَعْرِضُ لَهُ شَيْ‏ءٌ مِنَ الْهَوَامِّ فَيَقْتُلُهُ
titles.en: Chapter 47 – The praying one, something from the insects presents itself to him, so he kills it

titles.ar: باب بِنَاءِ الْمَسَاجِدِ وَ مَا يُؤْخَذُ مِنْهَا وَ الْحَدَثِ فِيهَا مِنَ النَّوْمِ وَ غَيْرِهِ
titles.en: Chapter 48 – Construction of the Masjid, and what can be taken from it, and the breaking of the ablution inside it due to sleep or something else
Chapter 49 – The merits of the Salāt in the Jam’at

titles.ar: باب الصَّلَاةِ خَلْفَ مَنْ لَا يُقْتَدَى بِهِ
titles.en: Chapter 50 – The Salāt behind the one whom one does not follow with Non-Shias)

titles.ar: باب مَنْ تُكْرَهُ الصَّلَاةُ خَلْفَهُ وَ الْعَبْدِ يَؤُمُّ الْقَوْمَ وَ مَنْ أَحَقُّ أَنْ يُؤَمَّ
titles.en: Chapter 51 – The one behind whom the Salāt is disliked, and the slave leading the people, and the one who is rightful of leading (the Salāt)

titles.ar: باب الرَّجُلِ يَؤُمُّ النِّسَاءَ وَ الْمَرْأَةِ تَؤُمُّ النِّسَاءَ
titles.en: Chapter 52 – The man leading the women, and the woman leading the women

titles.ar: باب الصَّلَاةِ خَلْفَ مَنْ يُقْتَدَى بِهِ وَ الْقِرَاءَةِ خَلْفَهُ وَ ضَمَانِهِ الصَّلَاةَ
titles.en: Chapter 53 – The Salāt behind the one who is followed by, and the recitation behind him, and his responsibility of the Salāt

titles.ar: باب الرَّجُلِ يُصَلِّي بِالْقَوْمِ وَ هُوَ عَلَى غَيْرِ طُهْرٍ أَوْ لِغَيْرِ الْقِبْلَةِ
titles.en: Chapter 54 – A man prays Salāt with the people (leading them) and he is upon without cleanliness, or towards other than the Qiblah

titles.ar: باب الرَّجُلِ يُصَلِّي وَحْدَهُ ثُمَّ يُعِيدُ فِي الْجَمَاعَةِ أَوْ يُصَلِّي بِقَوْمٍ وَ قَدْ كَانَ صَلَّى قَبْلَ ذَلِكَ
titles.en: Chapter 55 – The Salāt alone, then he repeats in the Jam’at, or he prays Salāt with a group and he had already prayed before that

titles.ar: باب الرَّجُلِ يُدْرِكُ مَعَ الْإِمَامِ بَعْضَ صَلَاتِهِ وَ يُحْدِثُ الْإِمَامُ فَيُقَدِّمُهُ
titles.en: Chapter 56 – A man attains part of his Salāt with the Imam, and the Imam breaks his ablution, so he asks him to lead

titles.ar: باب الرَّجُلِ يَخْطُو إِلَى الصَّفِّ أَوْ يَقُومُ خَلْفَ الصَّفِّ وَحْدَهُ أَوْ يَكُونُ بَيْنَهُ وَ بَيْنَ الْإِمَامِ مَا لَا يَتَخَطَّى
titles.en: Chapter 57 – The man who lines up to a row, or he stand behind the row alone, or there happens to be between him and the Imam what cannot constitue a line

titles.ar: باب الصَّلَاةِ فِي الْكَعْبَةِ وَ فَوْقَهَا وَ فِي الْبِيَعِ وَ الْكَنَائِسِ وَ الْمَوَاضِعِ الَّتِي تُكْرَهُ الصَّلَاةُ فِيهَا
titles.en: Chapter 58 – The Salāt in the Kabah and above it, and in the synagogues, and the churches, and the places in which the Salāt is disliked

titles.ar: باب الصَّلَاةِ فِي ثَوْبٍ وَاحِدٍ وَ الْمَرْأَةِ فِي كَمْ تُصَلِّي وَ صَلَاةِ الْعُرَاةِ وَ التَّوَشُّحِ
titles.en: Chapter 59 – The Salāt performed in one piece of cloth, and the woman, how many (clothes) can she pray Salāt in, and a Salāt of the naked, and wearing the scarf

titles.ar: باب اللِّبَاسِ الَّذِي تُكْرَهُ الصَّلَاةُ فِيهِ وَ مَا لَا تُكْرَهُ
titles.en: Chapter 60 - The clothes in which the Salāt is disliked, and what is not disliked

titles.ar: باب الرَّجُلِ يُصَلِّي فِي الثَّوْبِ وَ هُوَ غَيْرُ طَاهِرٍ عَالِماً أَوْ جَاهِلًا
titles.en: Chapter 61 – The man prays Salāt in the clothes and they are without cleanliness, knowingly or unknowingly

titles.ar: باب الرَّجُلِ يُصَلِّي وَ هُوَ مُتَلَثِّمٌ أَوْ مُخْتَضِبٌ أَوْ لَا يُخْرِجُ يَدَيْهِ مِنْ تَحْتِ الثَّوْبِ فِي صَلَاتِهِ
titles.en: Chapter 62 – The man prays Salāt and he is veiled, or dyed, or he does not take out his hand from beneath the clothes in his Salāt

titles.ar: باب صَلَاةِ الصِّبْيَانِ وَ مَتَى يُؤْخَذُونَ بِهَا
titles.en: Chapter 63 – The Salāt of the children, and when they should begin Salāt

titles.ar: باب صَلَاةِ الشَّيْخِ الْكَبِيرِ وَ الْمَرِيضِ
titles.en: Chapter 64 – The Salāt of an elderly man and the sick

titles.ar: باب صَلَاةِ الْمُغْمَى عَلَيْهِ وَ الْمَرِيضِ الَّذِي تَفُوتُهُ الصَّلَاةُ
titles.en: Chapter 65 – Salāt of the unconscious and the sick who has missed out on the Salāt

titles.ar: باب فَضْلِ يَوْمِ الْجُمُعَةِ وَ لَيْلَتِهِ
titles.en: Chapter 66 – Merits of the day of Friday and its night
Chapter 67 – The adorning on the day of Friday

titles.ar: باب وُجُوبِ الْجُمُعَةِ وَ عَلَى كَمْ تَجِبُ
titles.en: Chapter 68 – Obligation for the Friday (Salāt) and how many is it Obligated upon

titles.ar: باب وَقْتِ صَلَاةِ الْجُمُعَةِ وَ وَقْتِ صَلَاةِ الْعَصْرِ يَوْمَ الْجُمُعَةِ
titles.en: Chapter 69 – The time for the Friday Salāt, and the time for Al Asr Salāt on the day of Friday

titles.ar: باب تَهْيِئَةِ الْإِمَامِ لِلْجُمُعَةِ وَ خُطْبَتِهِ وَ الْإِنْصَاتِ
titles.en: Chapter 70 – The preparation of the prayer leader, and his sermon and the listening (to it)

titles.ar: باب الْقِرَاءَةِ يَوْمَ الْجُمُعَةِ وَ لَيْلَتَهَا فِي الصَّلَوَاتِ
titles.en: Chapter 71 – The recitation on the day of Friday and its night in the Salāt

titles.ar: باب الْقُنُوتِ فِي صَلَاةِ الْجُمُعَةِ وَ الدُّعَاءِ فِيهِ
titles.en: Chapter 72 – The Qunut during the Friday Salāt and the supplication during it

titles.ar: باب مَنْ فَاتَتْهُ الْجُمُعَةُ مَعَ الْإِمَامِ
titles.en: Chapter 73 – The one who misses out on the Friday (Salāt) with the prayer leader
Chapter 74 – The voluntary (Salāt) on the day of Friday
Chapter 75 – Miscellaneous regarding the Friday

titles.ar: باب وَقْتِ الصَّلَاةِ فِي السَّفَرِ وَ الْجَمْعِ بَيْنَ الصَّلَاتَيْنِ
titles.en: Chapter 76 – Timing of the Salāt during the journey and the gathering between the two Salāt

titles.ar: باب حَدِّ الْمَسِيرِ الَّذِي تُقْصَرُ فِيهِ الصَّلَاةُ
titles.en: Chapter 77 – A limit of the traveller at which he would shorten the Salāt

titles.ar: باب مَنْ يُرِيدُ السَّفَرَ أَوْ يَقْدَمُ مِنْ سَفَرٍ مَتَى يَجِبُ عَلَيْهِ التَّقْصِيرُ أَوِ التَّمَامُ
titles.en: Chapter 78 – The one who intends the journey or comes back from a journey, when would the shortening or the complete (Salāt) be Obligated upon him?’

titles.ar: باب الْمُسَافِرِ يَقْدَمُ الْبَلْدَةَ كَمْ يُقَصِّرُ الصَّلَاةَ
titles.en: Chapter 79 – The traveller comes back to the city, how much Salāt would he shorten

titles.ar: باب صَلَاةِ الْمَلَّاحِينَ وَ الْمُكَارِينَ وَ أَصْحَابِ الصَّيْدِ وَ الرَّجُلِ يَخْرُجُ إِلَى ضَيْعَتِهِ
titles.en: Chapter 80 – The sailors, and the Hirers, and the hunters, and the man who goes out to his estate

titles.ar: باب الْمُسَافِرِ يَدْخُلُ فِي صَلَاةِ الْمُقِيمِ
titles.en: Chapter 81 – The traveller enters into a Salāt of the staying-one
Chapter 82 – The voluntary (Salāt) during the journey
Chapter 83 – The Salāt (performed) in the ship
Chapter 84 – The optional Salāt

titles.ar: باب تَقْدِيمِ النَّوَافِلِ وَ تَأْخِيرِهَا وَ قَضَائِهَا وَ صَلَاةِ الضُّحَى
titles.en: Chapter 85 – Preceding the optional (Salāt) and delaying it, and its payback, and the Salāt at forenoon
Chapter 86 – Salāt of (during) fear

titles.ar: باب صَلَاةِ الْمُطَارَدَةِ وَ الْمُوَاقَفَةِ وَ الْمُسَايَفَةِ
titles.en: Chapter 87 – The Salāt of the pursuit, and the cover, and the combat

titles.ar: باب صَلَاةِ الْعِيدَيْنِ وَ الْخُطْبَةِ فِيهِمَا
titles.en: Chapter 88 – Salāt of the two Eids and the sermon in these two
Chapter 89 – Salāt for the rain
Chapter 90 – Salāt of the eclipse
Chapter 91 – Salāt of the Glorification (Tasbeeh)

titles.ar: باب صَلَاةِ فَاطِمَةَ ( عليها السلام ) وَ غَيْرِهَا مِنْ صَلَاةِ التَّرْغِيبِ
titles.en: Chapter 92 – Salāt of Syeda Fatimaasws, and others from the Salāt of exhortation
Chapter 93 – Salāt of Istikhara (Seeking Allahszwj’s Choice)
Chapter 94 – The Salāt regarding seeking of the livelihood
Chapter 95 – Salāt for the needs
Chapter 96 – Salāt of the one who fears an abhorrence
Chapter 97 – The Salāt of the one who intends a journey
Chapter 98 – Salāt of gratefulness

titles.ar: باب صَلَاةِ مَنْ أَرَادَ أَنْ يَدْخُلَ بِأَهْلِهِ وَ مَنْ أَرَادَ أَنْ يَتَزَوَّجَ
titles.en: Chapter 99 – Salāt of the one who intends to sleep with his wife, and the one who intends to get married
Chapter 100 – The Miscellaneous
Chapter 101 – Masjids of Al-Kufa

titles.ar: باب فَضْلِ الْمَسْجِدِ الْأَعْظَمِ بِالْكُوفَةِ وَ فَضْلِ الصَّلَاةِ فِيهِ وَ الْمَوَاضِعِ الْمَحْبُوبَةِ فِيهِ
titles.en: Chapter 102 – The merit of the Grand Masjid of Al-Kufa, and the merit of the Salāt performed therein, and the beloved places in it
Chapter 103 – Masjid Al-Sahla

titles.ar: باب فَرْضِ الزَّكَاةِ وَ مَا يَجِبُ فِي الْمَالِ مِنَ الْحُقُوقِ
titles.en: Chapter 1 – The Obligation of Zakāt, and what is Obligated in the wealth, from the rights
Chapter 2 – Prevention of the Zakāt

titles.ar: باب الْعِلَّةِ فِي وَضْعِ الزَّكَاةِ عَلَى مَا هِيَ لَمْ تُزَدْ وَ لَمْ تُنْقَصْ
titles.en: Chapter 3 – The reason regarding the placing of the Zakāt, upon what is it, and it is not increased and not reduced

titles.ar: باب مَا وَضَعَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ عَلَى أَهْلِ بَيْتِهِ الزَّكَاةَ عَلَيْهِ
titles.en: Chapter 4 – What Rasool-Allahsaww placed the Zakāt on, upon hissaww family
Chapter 5 – What would be purified (Zakāt paid) from the grains

titles.ar: باب مَا لَا يَجِبُ فِيهِ الزَّكَاةُ مِمَّا تُنْبِتُ الْأَرْضُ مِنَ الْخُضَرِ وَ غَيْرِهَا
titles.en: Chapter 6 – What the Zakāt is not Obligated upon, from the vegetation of the earth, from the greenery and other than it

titles.ar: باب أَقَلِّ مَا يَجِبُ فِيهِ الزَّكَاةُ مِنَ الْحَرْثِ
titles.en: Chapter 7 – The least of what Obligates the Zakāt regarding it, from the farm

titles.ar: باب أَنَّ الصَّدَقَةَ فِي التَّمْرِ مَرَّةٌ وَاحِدَةٌ
titles.en: Chapter 8 – The charity regarding the dates is for one time (only)
Chapter 9 – Zakāt of the gold and the silver

titles.ar: باب أَنَّهُ لَيْسَ عَلَى الْحُلِيِّ وَ سَبَائِكِ الذَّهَبِ وَ نُقَرِ الْفِضَّةِ وَ الْجَوْهَرِ زَكَاةٌ
titles.en: Chapter 10 – There is no Zakāt upon the ornaments, and the gold alloys, and the silver carvings and the jewels

titles.ar: باب زَكَاةِ الْمَالِ الْغَائِبِ وَ الدَّيْنِ وَ الْوَدِيعَةِ
titles.en: Chapter 11 – Zakāt of the hidden wealth, and the debts, and the deposits
Chapter 12 – Timings of the Zakāt
Chapter 13 – A Chapter

titles.ar: باب الْمَالِ الَّذِي لَا يَحُولُ عَلَيْهِ الْحَوْلُ فِي يَدِ صَاحِبِهِ
titles.en: Chapter 14 – The wealth on which a year has not passed upon in the hand of its owner

titles.ar: باب مَا يَسْتَفِيدُ الرَّجُلُ مِنَ الْمَالِ بَعْدَ أَنْ يُزَكِّيَ مَا عِنْدَهُ مِنَ الْمَالِ
titles.en: Chapter 15 – What the man benefits from the wealth after having purified (paid Zakāt) on what was with him from the wealth

titles.ar: باب الرَّجُلِ يَشْتَرِي الْمَتَاعَ فَيَكْسُدُ عَلَيْهِ وَ الْمُضَارَبَةِ
titles.en: Chapter 16 – A man buys goods so it becomes un-saleable upon him, and the speculation

titles.ar: باب مَا يَجِبُ عَلَيْهِ الصَّدَقَةُ مِنَ الْحَيَوَانِ وَ مَا لَا يَجِبُ
titles.en: Chapter 17 – What Obligates the charity (Zakāt) upon the animals, and what does not Obligate
Chapter 18 – Charity (Zakāt) of the camels
Chapter 19 – A Chapter (The ages of the camels)
Chapter 20 – Charity (Zakāt) of the cows
Chapter 21 – Charity (Zakāt) of the sheep
Chapter 22 – Discipline of the charity (Zakāt) collector
Chapter 23 – Zakāt on the wealth of the orphans

titles.ar: باب زَكَاةِ مَالِ الْمَمْلُوكِ وَ الْمُكَاتَبِ وَ الْمَجْنُونِ
titles.en: Chapter 24 – Zakāt on the wealth of the owned slaves, and the contracted slaves, and the insane

titles.ar: باب فِيمَا يَأْخُذُ السُّلْطَانُ مِنَ الْخَرَاجِ
titles.en: Chapter 25 – Regarding what the Sultan (ruling authority) takes from the taxes

titles.ar: باب الرَّجُلِ يُخَلِّفُ عِنْدَ أَهْلِهِ مِنَ النَّفَقَةِ مَا يَكُونُ فِي مِثْلِهَا الزَّكَاةُ
titles.en: Chapter 26 – The man leaves behind expenses with his wife similar to what would happen to incur the Zakāt

titles.ar: باب الرَّجُلِ يُعْطِي مِنْ زَكَاةٍ مَنْ يَظُنُّ أَنَّهُ مُعْسِرٌ ثُمَّ يَجِدُهُ مُوسِراً
titles.en: Chapter 27 – The man gives from the Zakāt to the one whom he thinks is financially straitened, then he finds him to be affluent

titles.ar: باب الزَّكَاةِ لَا تُعْطَى غَيْرَ أَهْلِ الْوَلَايَةِ
titles.en: Chapter 28 – The Zakāt cannot be given to other than the people of Al-Wilayah
Chapter 29 – Fulfilment of the Zakāt on behalf of the deceased

titles.ar: باب أَقَلِّ مَا يُعْطَى مِنَ الزَّكَاةِ وَ أَكْثَرَ
titles.en: Chapter 30 – The least of what would be given from the Zakāt, and the most

titles.ar: باب أَنَّهُ يُعْطَى عِيَالُ الْمُؤْمِنِ مِنَ الزَّكَاةِ إِذَا كَانُوا صِغَاراً وَ يُقْضَى عَنِ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ الدُّيُونُ مِنَ الزَّكَاةِ
titles.en: Chapter 31 - Giving from the Zakāt to the dependants of the Believer when they were young, and fulfilling the debts from the Believers from the Zakāt

titles.ar: باب تَفْضِيلِ أَهْلِ الزَّكَاةِ بَعْضِهِمْ عَلَى بَعْضٍ
titles.en: Chapter 32 - The preferring of the deserving ones of e Zakāt, some of them over the others

Chapter 72 – The day of Al-Fitr (1st Shawwal)

titles.ar: بَابُ مَا يَجِبُ عَلَى النَّاسِ إِذَا صَحَّ عِنْدَهُمُ الرُّؤْيَةُ يَوْمَ الْفِطْرِ بَعْدَ مَا أَصْبَحُوا صَائِمِينَ
titles.en: Chapter 73 – What is Obligated upon the people when the sighting (of the crescent) holds true with them on the day of Al-Fitr, after they had woken up Fasting
Chapter 74 – The Miscellaneous
Chapter 75 – The Fitra (Obligatory Zakat payable on the 1st Shawwal)
Chapter 76 – The Itikaaf (Seclusion in the Masjid)

titles.ar: بَابُ أَنَّهُ لَا يَكُونُ الِاعْتِكَافُ إِلَّا بِصَوْمٍ
titles.en: Chapter 77 – The Itikaaf (seclusion in the Masjid) does not take place except with Fasting

titles.ar: بَابُ الْمَسَاجِدِ الَّتِي يَصْلُحُ الِاعْتِكَافُ فِيهَا
titles.en: Chapter 78 – The Masjids which are correct for the Itikaaf to be therein
Chapter 79 – The least of what can be for the Itikaaf (Seclusion in the Masjid)

titles.ar: بَابُ الْمُعْتَكِفِ لَا يَخْرُجُ مِنَ الْمَسْجِدِ إِلَّا لِحَاجَةٍ
titles.en: Chapter 80 – The one performing Itikaaf cannot go out from the Masjid except for a need

titles.ar: بَابُ الْمُعْتَكِفِ يَمْرَضُ وَ الْمُعْتَكِفَةِ تَطْمَثُ
titles.en: Chapter 81 – The one performing Itikaaf becomes sick, and the female performing Itikaaf menstruates
Chapter 82 – The one performing Itikaaf sleeps with his wife
Chapter 83 – The Miscellaneous

titles.ar: بَابُ بَدْءِ الْحَجَرِ وَ الْعِلَّةِ فِي اسْتِلَامِهِ
titles.en: Chapter 1 – The commencement of the (Black) Stone and the reason for kissing it
Chapter 2 – Commencement of the House (Kaaba) and the Circumambulation

titles.ar: بَابُ أَنَّ أَوَّلَ مَا خَلَقَ اللَّهُ مِنَ الْأَرَضِينَ مَوْضِعُ الْبَيْتِ وَ كَيْفَ كَانَ أَوَّلَ مَا خَلَقَ
titles.en: Chapter 3 – The first of what Allahazwj Created from the lands was the place of the House (Kaaba), and how was the first of what Heazwj Created

titles.ar: بَابٌ فِي حَجِّ آدَمَ ( عليه السلام )
titles.en: Chapter 4 – Regarding the Hajj of Adamas

titles.ar: بَابُ عِلَّةِ الْحَرَمِ وَ كَيْفَ صَارَ هَذَا الْمِقْدَارَ
titles.en: Chapter 5 – Reason for the Sanctuary, and how it came to be of this measurement

titles.ar: بَابُ ابْتِلَاءِ الْخَلْقِ وَ اخْتِبَارِهِمْ بِالْكَعْبَةِ
titles.en: Chapter 6 – Trials of the creatures and their Testing by the Kaaba

titles.ar: بَابُ حَجِّ إِبْرَاهِيمَ وَ إِسْمَاعِيلَ وَ بِنَائِهِمَا الْبَيْتَ وَ مَنْ وَلِيَ الْبَيْتَ بَعْدَهُمَا ( عليهما السلام )
titles.en: Chapter 7 – Hajj of Ibrahimas and Ismailas, and theiras building the House (Kaaba), and the ones who were the guardians of the House (Kaaba) after themas
Chapter 8 – Hajj of the Prophetsas

titles.ar: بَابُ وُرُودِ تُبَّعٍ وَ أَصْحَابِ الْفِيلِ الْبَيْتَ وَ حَفْرِ عَبْدِ الْمُطَّلِبِ زَمْزَمَ وَ هَدْمِ قُرَيْشٍ الْكَعْبَةَ وَ بِنَائِهِمْ إِيَّاهَا وَ هَدْمِ الْحَجَّاجِ لَهَا وَ بِنَائِهِ إِيَّاهَا
titles.en: Chapter 9 – The advent of Tubba and the owners of the elephants to the House (Kaaba), and Abdul Muttalibas’s digging of (the well of) Zamzam, and the Qureysh demolishing the Kaaba and their building of it, and demolishing of Al-Hajjaj of it and his building it

titles.ar: بَابٌ فِي قَوْلِهِ تَعَالَى فِيهِ آياتٌ بَيِّناتٌ
titles.en: Chapter 10 – Regarding the Words of the Exalted [3:97] In it are clear Signs
Chapter 11 - Miscellaneous

titles.ar: بَابُ أَنَّ اللَّهَ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ حَرَّمَ مَكَّةَ حِينَ خَلَقَ السَّمَاوَاتِ وَ الْأَرْضَ
titles.en: Chapter 12 – Allahazwj Mighty and Majestic Sancified Makkah when Heazwj Created the skies and the earth

titles.ar: بَابٌ فِي قَوْلِهِ تَعَالَى وَ مَنْ دَخَلَهُ كانَ آمِناً
titles.en: Chapter 13 – Regarding the Words of the Exalted [3:97] and whoever enters it shall be secure
Chapter 14 – Heresy in Makkah and the crimes
Chapter 15 – Displaying the weapon in Makkah
Chapter 16 – Wearing the clothing of the Kabah

titles.ar: بَابُ كَرَاهَةِ أَنْ يُؤْخَذَ مِنْ تُرَابِ الْبَيْتِ وَ حَصَاهُ
titles.en: Chapter 17 – Abhorrence of taking from the soil of the House (Kabah) and its pebbles
Chapter 18 – Abhorrence of staying in Makkah
Chapter 19 – A tree of the Al-Harram

titles.ar: بَابُ مَا يُذْبَحُ فِي الْحَرَمِ وَ مَا يُخْرَجُ بِهِ مِنْهُ
titles.en: Chapter 20 – What can be slaughtered inside the Al-Harram and what one came come out with, from it

titles.ar: بَابُ صَيْدِ الْحَرَمِ وَ مَا تَجِبُ فِيهِ الْكَفَّارَةُ
titles.en: Chapter 21 – Hunt of the Al-Harram and what expiation is Obligated with regards to it
Chapter 22 – The findings (lost property) of the Al-Harram
Chapter 23 – Merits of looking at the Kabah

titles.ar: باب فِيمَنْ رَأَى غَرِيمَهُ فِي الْحَرَمِ
titles.en: Chapter 24 – The one who sees his debtor in the Al-Harram
Chapter 25 – What is gifted to the Kabah

titles.ar: بَابٌ فِي قَوْلِهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ سَواءً الْعاكِفُ فِيهِ وَ الْبادِ
titles.en: Chapter 26 – Regarding the Words of the Mighty and Majestic [22:25] They are equal in it, the dweller and the visitor

titles.ar: بَابُ حَجِّ النَّبِيِّ ( صلى الله عليه وآله )
titles.en: Chapter 27 – Hajj of the Prophetsaww

titles.ar: بَابُ فَضْلِ الْحَجِّ وَ الْعُمْرَةِ وَ ثَوَابِهِمَا
titles.en: Chapter 28 – Merits of the Hajj and the Umra, and their Rewards
Chapter 29 – Obligation of (performing) the Hajj and the Umra
Chapter 30 – Ability for the Hajj

titles.ar: بَابُ مَنْ سَوَّفَ الْحَجَّ وَ هُوَ مُسْتَطِيعٌ
titles.en: Chapter 31 – The one who delays the Hajj and he is with the ability (for performing it)

titles.ar: بَابُ مَنْ يَخْرُجُ مِنْ مَكَّةَ لَا يُرِيدُ الْعَوْدَ إِلَيْهَا
titles.en: Chapter 32 – The one who goes out from Makkah not intending the return to it

titles.ar: بَابُ أَنَّهُ لَيْسَ فِي تَرْكِ الْحَجِّ خِيَرَةٌ وَ أَنَّ مَنْ حُبِسَ عَنْهُ فَبِذَنْبٍ
titles.en: Chapter 33 – There is no goodness in neglecting the Hajj, and if one is withheld from it, so it is due to sin

titles.ar: بَابُ أَنَّهُ لَوْ تَرَكَ النَّاسُ الْحَجَّ لَجَاءَهُمُ الْعَذَابُ
titles.en: Chapter 34 – It is such that if the people were to neglect the Hajj, the Punishment would come to them
Chapter 35 - Miscellaneous
Chapter 36 – The compelling upon the Hajj

titles.ar: بَابُ أَنَّ مَنْ لَمْ يُطِقِ الْحَجَّ بِبَدَنِهِ جَهَّزَ غَيْرَهُ
titles.en: Chapter 37 – The one who cannot endure the Hajj with his own body, should prepare someone else for it

titles.ar: بَابُ مَا يُجْزِئُ مِنْ حَجَّةِ الْإِسْلَامِ وَ مَا لَا يُجْزِئُ
titles.en: Chapter 38 – What suffices from the Hajj of Al-Islam and what does not suffice

titles.ar: بَابُ مَنْ لَمْ يَحُجَّ بَيْنَ خَمْسِ سِنِينَ
titles.en: Chapter 39 – The one who does not perform Hajj in between five years
Chapter 40 – The man borrows and he performs Hajj
Chapter 41 – The excess in the expenditure for the Hajj

titles.ar: بَابُ أَنَّهُ يُسْتَحَبُّ لِلرَّجُلِ أَنْ يَكُونَ مُتَهَيِّئاً لِلْحَجِّ فِي كُلِّ وَقْتٍ
titles.en: Chapter 42 – It is recommended for the man that he happens to be prepared for the Hajj at all times

titles.ar: بَابُ الرَّجُلِ يُسْلِمُ فَيَحُجُّ قَبْلَ أَنْ يَخْتَتِنَ
titles.en: Chapter 43 – The man becomes a Muslim, so he performs Hajj before he is circumcised

titles.ar: بَابُ الْمَرْأَةِ يَمْنَعُهَا زَوْجُهَا مِنْ حَجَّةِ الْإِسْلَامِ
titles.en: Chapter 44 – The woman who is forbidden by her husband from performing the Hajj of Al-Islam

titles.ar: بَابُ الْقَوْلِ عِنْدَ الْخُرُوجِ مِنْ بَيْتِهِ وَ فَضْلِ الصَّدَقَةِ
titles.en: Chapter 45 – The words (to be spoken) during the going out from his house, and the merits of the charity

titles.ar: بَابُ الْقَوْلِ إِذَا خَرَجَ الرَّجُلُ مِنْ بَيْتِهِ
titles.en: Chapter 46 – The words (to be spoken) when the man goes out from his house
Chapter 47 – The Exhortation
Chapter 48 – The supplication in the road
Chapter 49 – The Months for the Hajj
Chapter 50 – The Greater Hajj and the Lesser (Hajj)
Chapter 51 – The Types of Hajj

titles.ar: بَابُ مَا عَلَى الْمُتَمَتِّعِ مِنَ الطَّوَافِ وَ السَّعْيِ
titles.en: Chapter 52 – What is upon the performer of Tamatto, from the circumambulation and the Sa’ee

titles.ar: بَابُ صِفَةِ الْإِقْرَانِ وَ مَا يَجِبُ عَلَى الْقَارِنِ
titles.en: Chapter 53 – Description of the pairing (Umra & Hajj), and what is Obligated upon the (performer of the) pairing (Umra & Hajj)
Chapter 54 – Description of the marking (the sacrificial animal) and the yoking (Taqleed)
Chapter 55 – The exclusive (Hajj)
Chapter 56 – Regarding the one who does not intend the Tamatto

titles.ar: بَابُ حَجِّ الْمُجَاوِرِينَ وَ قُطَّانِ مَكَّةَ
titles.en: Chapter 57 – The Hajj of the ones in the vicinity and residents of Makkah
Chapter 58 – Hajj of the children and the owned slaves

titles.ar: بَابُ الرَّجُلِ يَمُوتُ صَرُورَةً أَوْ يُوصِي بِالْحَجِّ
titles.en: Chapter 59 – The man dies as Saroura (not having had performed Hajj), or he bequeaths with the Hajj
Chapter 60 – The woman performs Hajj on behalf of the man

titles.ar: بَابُ مَنْ يُعْطَى حَجَّةً مُفْرَدَةً فَيَتَمَتَّعُ أَوْ يَخْرُجُ مِنْ غَيْرِ الْمَوْضِعِ الَّذِي يُشْتَرَطُ
titles.en: Chapter 61 – The one who is given (money) to perform exclusive Hajj, so he performs Tamatto, or he goes out from other than the place which was stipulated

titles.ar: بَابُ مَنْ يُوصِي بِحَجَّةٍ فَيُحَجُّ عَنْهُ مِنْ غَيْرِ مَوْضِعِهِ أَوْ يُوصِي بِشَيْ‏ءٍ قَلِيلٍ فِي الْحَجِّ
titles.en: Chapter 62 – The one who bequeaths with a Hajj, so he performs Hajj from other than its place, or he bequeaths something little regarding the Hajj

titles.ar: بَابُ الرَّجُلِ يَأْخُذُ الْحَجَّةَ فَلَا تَكْفِيهِ أَوْ يَأْخُذُهَا فَيَدْفَعُهَا إِلَى غَيْرِهِ
titles.en: Chapter 63 – The man takes the (responsibility of performing) the Hajj but is not (paid) sufficienty, or he takes it and hands it over to someone else
Chapter 64 – The Hajj performed on behalf of the adversary
Chapter 65 – A Chapter

titles.ar: بَابُ مَا يَنْبَغِي لِلرَّجُلِ أَنْ يَقُولَ إِذَا حَجَّ عَنْ غَيْرِهِ
titles.en: Chapter 66 – What is befitting for the man that he should be saying when he performs Hajj on behalf of someone else

titles.ar: بَابُ الرَّجُلِ يَحُجُّ عَنْ غَيْرِهِ فَحَجَّ عَنْ غَيْرِ ذَلِكَ أَوْ يَطُوفُ عَنْ غَيْرِهِ
titles.en: Chapter 67 – A man performs Hajj on behalf of someone else, so he performs Hajj on behalf of someone other than that one, or circumambulates on behalf of someone else

titles.ar: بَابُ مَنْ حَجَّ عَنْ غَيْرِهِ إِنَّ لَهُ فِيهَا شِرْكَةً
titles.en: Chapter 68 – The one who performs Hajj on behalf of someone else; there is a participation in it for him
Chapter 69 – Miscellaneous

titles.ar: بَابُ الرَّجُلِ يُعْطَى الْحَجَّ فَيَصْرِفُ مَا أَخَذَ فِي غَيْرِ الْحَجِّ أَوْ تَفْضُلُ الْفَضْلَةُ مِمَّا أُعْطِيَ
titles.en: Chapter 70 – A man gives the (responsibility of performing the) Hajj, but he spends what he took, on other than the Hajj, or there remained an excess from what he was given

titles.ar: بَابُ الطَّوَافِ وَ الْحَجِّ عَنِ الْأَئِمَّةِ ( عليهم السلام )
titles.en: Chapter 71 – The circumambulation and the Hajj on behalf of the Imamsasws

titles.ar: بَابُ مَنْ يُشْرِكُ قَرَابَتَهُ وَ إِخْوَتَهُ فِي حَجَّتِهِ أَوْ يَصِلُهُمْ بِحَجَّةٍ
titles.en: Chapter 72 – The one who participates his relatives and his brethren in his Hajj, or he links them with Hajj

titles.ar: بَابُ تَوْفِيرِ الشَّعْرِ لِمَنْ أَرَادَ الْحَجَّ وَ الْعُمْرَةَ
titles.en: Chapter 73 – Letting grow the hair for the one who intends the Hajj and the Umra
Chapter 74 – Junctures for (wearing of) the Ihraam
Chapter 75 – The one who wears Ihraam besides the juncture

titles.ar: بَابُ مَنْ جَاوَزَ مِيقَاتَ أَرْضِهِ بِغَيْرِ إِحْرَامٍ أَوْ دَخَلَ مَكَّةَ بِغَيْرِ إِحْرَامٍ
titles.en: Chapter 76 – The one who exceeds the land of a juncture without Ihraam, or enters Makkah without Ihraam
Chapter 77 – What is Obligated for tying the Ihraam

titles.ar: بَابُ مَا يُجْزِئُ مِنْ غُسْلِ الْإِحْرَامِ وَ مَا لَا يُجْزِئُ
titles.en: Chapter 78 – What suffices from washing for the Ihraam and what does not suffice

titles.ar: بَابُ مَا يَجُوزُ لِلْمُحْرِمِ بَعْدَ اغْتِسَالِهِ مِنَ الطِّيبِ وَ الصَّيْدِ وَ غَيْرِ ذَلِكَ قَبْلَ أَنْ يُلَبِّيَ
titles.en: Chapter 79 – What is allowed for the one in Ihraam after his washing, from the perfume, and the hunting, and other than that, before he exclaims Talbiyya

titles.ar: بَابُ صَلَاةِ الْإِحْرَامِ وَ عَقْدِهِ وَ الِاشْتِرَاطِ فِيهِ
titles.en: Chapter 80 – The Prayer of the Ihraam, and tying it, and the stipulations regarding it
Chapter 81 – The Talbiyya (The exclamation: ‘Here I am Lordazwj! Here I am!)

titles.ar: بَابُ مَا يَنْبَغِي تَرْكُهُ لِلْمُحْرِمِ مِنَ الْجِدَالِ وَ غَيْرِهِ
titles.en: Chapter 82 – What is befitting for the one in Ihraam to neglect, from the arguing and such else

titles.ar: بَابُ مَا يَلْبَسُ الْمُحْرِمُ مِنَ الثِّيَابِ وَ مَا يُكْرَهُ لَهُ لِبَاسُهُ
titles.en: Chapter 83 – What the one in Ihraam can wear, from the clothes, and what is disliked for him, his clothing

titles.ar: بَابُ الْمُحْرِمِ يَشُدُّ عَلَى وَسَطِهِ الْهِمْيَانَ وَ الْمِنْطَقَةَ
titles.en: Chapter 84 – The one in Ihraam tightens the money-purse and the belt upon his waist

titles.ar: بَابُ مَا يَجُوزُ لِلْمُحْرِمَةِ أَنْ تَلْبَسَهُ مِنَ الثِّيَابِ وَ الْحُلِيِّ وَ مَا يُكْرَهُ لَهَا مِنْ ذَلِكَ
titles.en: Chapter 85 – What is allowed for the female in Ihraam to wear from the clothes, and the ornaments, and what is disliked for her from that

titles.ar: بَابُ الْمُحْرِمِ يُضْطَرُّ إِلَى مَا لَا يَجُوزُ لَهُ لُبْسُهُ
titles.en: Chapter 86 – The one in Ihraam is desperate to what is not allowed for him to wear

titles.ar: بَابُ مَا يَجِبُ فِيهِ الْفِدَاءُ مِنْ لُبْسِ الثِّيَابِ
titles.en: Chapter 87 – What Obligates the expiation, from wearing the clothes

titles.ar: بَابُ الرَّجُلِ يُحْرِمُ فِي قَمِيصٍ أَوْ يَلْبَسُهُ بَعْدَ مَا يُحْرِمُ
titles.en: Chapter 88 – The man wear Ihraam in a shirt, or he wears it after wearing Ihraam

titles.ar: بَابُ الْمُحْرِمِ يُغَطِّي رَأْسَهُ أَوْ وَجْهَهُ مُتَعَمِّداً أَوْ نَاسِياً
titles.en: Chapter 89 – The one in Ihraam covers his head or his face deliberately, or out of forgetfulness
Chapter 90 – The shade for the one in Ihraam

titles.ar: بَابُ أَنَّ الْمُحْرِمَ لَا يَرْتَمِسُ فِي الْمَاءِ
titles.en: Chapter 91 – The one in Ihraam cannot immerse himself into the water
Chapter 92 – The perfume for the one in Ihraam

titles.ar: بَابُ مَا يُكْرَهُ مِنَ الزِّينَةِ لِلْمُحْرِمِ
titles.en: Chapter 93 – What is disliked from the adornments for the one in Ihraam

titles.ar: بَابُ الْعِلَاجِ لِلْمُحْرِمِ إِذَا مَرِضَ أَوْ أَصَابَهُ جُرْحٌ أَوْ خُرَاجٌ أَوْ عِلَّةٌ
titles.en: Chapter 94 – The treatment for the one in Ihraam when he falls sick, or is hit by an injury, or pus, or a disease

titles.ar: بَابُ الْمُحْرِمِ يَحْتَجِمُ أَوْ يَقُصُّ ظُفُراً أَوْ شَعْراً أَوْ شَيْئاً مِنْهُ
titles.en: Chapter 95 – The one in Ihraam gets cupping done, or he clips nails, or hair, or something from it

titles.ar: بَابُ الْمُحْرِمِ يُلْقِي الدَّوَابَّ عَنْ نَفْسِهِ
